rationale: For Ukraine, the most significant development is the near-concluded US-Iran deal — if finalized, it could shift US diplomatic and military attention away from Ukraine; war continues at maximum background level.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal near conclusion, Khamenei funeral announced
top_events.summary: A US-Iran deal remains close but unsigned; Khamenei's death and funeral could accelerate negotiations. A concluded deal risks diverting US attention and resources from Ukrainian support.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war — active combat continues
top_events.summary: War continues at maximum intensity with no qualitative change this cycle. Daily life in Ukraine remains severely disrupted by ongoing combat and infrastructure threats.

top_events.title: Israel strikes Lebanon; Gaza deaths mount post-ceasefire
top_events.summary: Continued Israeli military operations in Lebanon and Gaza show no sign of broader regional de-escalation; indirectly relevant as it keeps US focus on the Middle East rather than Ukraine.
